case_title: LARRY MILLER VS. KEVIN VALENTINE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAY-20-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-26-2009 VACATED.

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-20-2009 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT KEVIN VALENTINE'S HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES CONTINUED FROM MAY-20-2009 TO MAY-27-2009, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR FURTHER HEARING. DEFENDANT TO REPORT THE STATUS OF THE CASE. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780 (206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KEVIN VALENTINE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND PER DIEM FEES DENIED. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE MAILED TO OTHER PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY CSR# 8098 (206)
